ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "content" TEXT /* The content of the book review */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date and time the review was created */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* The rating given by the user */,
  "book_isbn" TEXT /* The ISBN of the book being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who posted the review */,
  "anon" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review was posted anonymously */,
  "title" TEXT /* The title of the review */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review has been edited */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* The date and time the review was edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_isbn FOREIGN KEY ("book_isbn") REFERENCES books ("book_isbn")
)

CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_isbn" TEXT /* The ISBN of the book */,
  "title" TEXT /* The title of the book */,
  "author" TEXT /* The author of the book */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* The year the book was published */,
  "genre" TEXT /* The genre of the book */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* The publisher of the book */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* The number of pages in the book */,
  "price" REAL /* The price of the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_isbn"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author FOREIGN KEY ("author") REFERENCES book_authors ("author_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* The username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* The email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* The date the user joined the platform */,
  "role" TEXT /* The role of the user (e.g., reader, moderator) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* The URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the review being flagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who flagged the review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* The reason for flagging the review */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* The date and time the flag was raised */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the flag has been resolved */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* The date and time the flag was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_flags_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* The name of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book's rating */,
  "book_isbn" TEXT /* The ISBN of the book */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* The average rating of the book */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* The total number of ratings received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_ratings_book_isbn FOREIGN KEY ("book_isbn") REFERENCES books ("book_isbn")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review's statistics */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the review */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* The number of likes the review has received */,
  "views" INTEGER /* The number of views the review has received */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* The number of times the review has been shared */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* The number of comments on the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_statistics_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderator_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the review affected by the action */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* The type of action taken (e.g., approve, reject, edit) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* The date and time the action was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderator_actions_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_following" (
  "following_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each following relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who is following */,
  "followed_user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user being followed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("following_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_following_followed_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("followed_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_following_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the review the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who left the comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* The content of the comment */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date and time the comment was left */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the comment being flagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who flagged the comment */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* The reason for flagging the comment */,
  "flag_date" TEXT /* The date and time the flag was raised */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* The type of notification (e.g., comment, like, follow) */,
  "content" TEXT /* The content of the notification */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* The date and time the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
